name: punch-safe-endpoint
description: Validate damage-first swept-volume punches finish outside every intact collider across center, edge, repeated tunnel, rubble, and high-power cases.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local function overlap(root) local q=OverlapParams.new() q.FilterType=Enum.RaycastFilterType.Include q.FilterDescendantsInstances={workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks']} local n=0 for _,b in ipairs(workspace:GetPartBoundsInBox(root.CFrame,Vector3.new(2.8,5.2,2.8),q)) do if b.CanCollide and not b:GetAttribute('Broken') and not b:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached') then n+=1 end end return n end local function run(name,x,power,repeats) c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=power,WallLevel=99,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart root.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.zero root.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(x,3,-20),Vector3.new(x,3,-200)) local dir=root.CFrame.LookVector local start=root.Position local minForward=0 local previous=0 local maxBack=0 local ok=true for i=1,repeats do p:SetAttribute('LastWallHit',0) local r=c:Invoke('PunchRadius') ok=ok and r.ok local now=(root.Position-start):Dot(dir) maxBack=math.max(maxBack,previous-now) previous=now task.wait(.12) end task.wait(.4) local result={name=name,ok=ok,overlap=overlap(root),forward=(root.Position-start):Dot(dir),maxBack=maxBack,safe=p:GetAttribute('LastPunchSafeTravel') or -1,correction=p:GetAttribute('LastPunchCollisionCorrectionStuds') or -1} result.valid=result.ok and result.overlap==0 and result.forward>=minForward and result.maxBack<.5 and result.correction==0 return result end local cases={run('center',-2,15,1),run('edge',18,15,1),run('tunnel',-2,1500000000,3),run('rubble',2,6000,2),run('high',-2,1500000000,1)} local all=true for _,v in ipairs(cases) do all=all and v.valid end return H:JSONEncode({allValid=all,cases=cases})
